/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/extern/imgui/backend/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/extern/imgui/backend/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/extern/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/src/Main/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/src/Source/Core/Common/ErrorHandling.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/src/Source/Core/IndexBuffer/IndexBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/src/Source/Core/Renderer/RendererWrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/src/Source/Core/Shader/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/src/Source/Core/ShaderProgram/ShaderProgram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/src/Source/Core/Texture/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/src/Source/Core/VertexArray/VertexArray.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/src/Source/Core/VertexBuffer/VertexBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/src/Source/Core/VertexBufferLayout/VertexBufferLayout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GraphicEngine.dir/src/Source/ImGui/ImGuiLayer.cpp.o -o GraphicEngine   -L/usr/include  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/include -lglfw /usr/lib/libGLEW.so /home/lax/Coding/GraphicEngine/extern/soil/lib/libSOIL.a /usr/local/lib/libglm.a /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
